name: GitMind Extension - Minimal Telemetry Queries
description: Essential queries for minimal telemetry tracking

queries.name: Daily Active Users - Last 30 Days
queries.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'gitmind.daily_active_user'
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| summarize UniqueUsers = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.user_id)) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp desc

queries.name: Message Generation Failures by Provider
queries.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'gitmind.message_generation_failure'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| summarize
    ErrorCount = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.user_id))
by
    Provider = tostring(customDimensions.provider),
    ErrorType = tostring(customDimensions.error_type)
| order by ErrorCount desc

queries.name: Error Types Summary
queries.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'gitmind.message_generation_failure'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| summarize
    Count = count(),
    AffectedUsers = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.user_id))
by ErrorType = tostring(customDimensions.error_type)
| order by Count desc

queries.name: Today's Active Users
queries.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'gitmind.daily_active_user'
| where timestamp > ago(1d)
| summarize TodayUsers = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.user_id))

queries.name: Failure Trend by Day
queries.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'gitmind.message_generation_failure'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| summarize FailureCount = count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp desc
